_doc: P0 quality regression pack. Deterministic fixture cases for scope/grounding/truncation validators. NOT a live LLM benchmark — unit rules must pass on these fixtures.

cases.subject: psm
cases.source_text: ANC includes early registration, BP, weight, IFA, TT, birth preparedness. JSY supports institutional delivery.
cases.answer_text:
Programmes
• Use PRAMS (Pregnancy Risk Assessment Monitoring System) for risk scoring in India.
• Give IFA tablets.

cases.subject: psm
cases.source_text: JSY and JSSK are maternal health schemes under NHM.
cases.answer_text:
Schemes
• Ashwini Health Yojana provides free ambulance transport.

cases.subject: psm
cases.source_text: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY) provides cash assistance for institutional delivery under NHM.
cases.answer_text:
Objectives
• Early registration of pregnancy in the first trimester supports baseline risk assessment and planning of care.
• Risk screening includes blood pressure, anaemia, and review of prior obstetric complications at each visit.
• Iron and folic acid supplementation with tetanus toxoid immunization are delivered as scheduled preventive care.
• Promote institutional delivery via JSY cash assistance under NHM for eligible mothers choosing facility birth.
• Counsel on danger signs, nutrition, and early postnatal follow-up before discharge planning begins.

cases.subject: psm
cases.source_text: Essential obstetric care includes skilled attendance and referral.
cases.answer_text:
Definition
• Essential obstetric care is basic maternity service at primary level.
• It includes skilled birth attendance only.

cases.subject: psm
cases.source_text: ANC objectives are early registration and screening.
